ddls:
CREATE TABLE "solves" (
  "solve_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solve */,
  "solve_type" TEXT /* Type of solve (e.g., once, iterative) */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for solving (e.g., auto, manual) */,
  "warm_start" TEXT /* Warm start setting (e.g., cold, warm) */,
  "min_search_proportion" REAL /* Minimum search proportion */,
  "threshold_proportion" REAL /* Threshold proportion */,
  "sub_solve_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sub-solve (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the solve (e.g., pending, in progress, completed, failed) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the solve */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the solve */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the solve */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the solve */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("solve_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solve_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solve configuration */,
  "solve_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solve this configuration belongs to */,
  "cut_type" TEXT /* Type of cut used (e.g., fixed) */,
  "cut_value" INTEGER /* Value of the cut */,
  "search_proportion_used" REAL /* Search proportion used */,
  "current_threshold" REAL /* Current threshold value */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the configuration */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the configuration */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solve_configs_solve_id FOREIGN KEY ("solve_id") REFERENCES solves ("solve_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_solves" (
  "sub_solve_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-solve */,
  "solve_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solve this sub-solve belongs to */,
  "n" INTEGER /* Value of n */,
  "p" REAL /* Value of p */,
  "q" REAL /* Value of q */,
  "cpu_time" REAL /* CPU time taken */,
  "variables" INTEGER /* Number of variables */,
  "constraints" INTEGER /* Number of constraints */,
  "cuts_sought" INTEGER /* Number of cuts sought */,
  "cuts_added" INTEGER /* Number of cuts added */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sub-solve */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the sub-solve */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the sub-solve */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the sub-solve */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the sub-solve */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_solve_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_solves_solve_id FOREIGN KEY ("solve_id") REFERENCES solves ("solve_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the project */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the project */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solve_project_map" (
  "solve_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solve */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project this solve belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("solve_id", "project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the tag */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the tag */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solve_tag_map" (
  "solve_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solve */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag this solve is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("solve_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the category */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the category */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solve_category_map" (
  "solve_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solve */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category this solve belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("solve_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "solve_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solve being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the solve */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the solve was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_solve_id FOREIGN KEY ("solve_id") REFERENCES solves ("solve_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "libraries" (
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each library */,
  "library_name" TEXT /* Name of the library */,
  "library_version" TEXT /* Version of the library */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who added the library */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the library */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solve_library_map" (
  "solve_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solve */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library used by this solve */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("solve_id", "library_id")
)
